title: Weapons+
description: Adds many new tools and weapons to the game using optifine's CIT functionality
body:
Optifine is required for this to work (or CITresewn)

Our discord server: https://discord.com/invite/WCvwtzW


This pack brings over many swords from Minecraft Dungeons, as well as some of our own CIT items!

For all the renames, please download the TexturesPlus test world!: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JQGutGKSlz8SOe59sSfhQ_p3MJ9Woj9n/view?usp=sharing
